message:
fix: Parameter reassignment in class __init__ methods

When a function parameter is reassigned inside the body (e.g., d = {}
inside an if block), we now correctly generate a mutable local copy
instead of trying to redeclare the renamed parameter.

- Add needs_mutable_copy flag to RenamedParam structs
- Skip var_renames for params that will get mutable copies
- Generate `var d: @TypeOf(__m2_p_d) = __m2_p_d;` at function start
- Mark as declared to prevent double-declaration
- Apply fix to all three init method generators

Also:
- Skip hoisting for renamed parameters in if-statement pre-hoisting
- Fix slice vs ArrayList access in comptime_builtins.zig
